text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear strange, possibly spiritual invocations
coming from inside the waiting room. I take a
peek inside to find...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Glory beee! Glory beee! Glory be...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whew. I got so excited, I might have gotten way more into that chant than usual!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I'm going to make use of all of my
motivation, courage, and luck in this race!
